revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Slovakia%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Slovakia%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for each of the eight [[Regions of Slovakia]]:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
| [[Template:Country data Banská Bystrica Region]] || {{flag|Banská Bystrica Region}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Bratislava Region]] || {{flag|Bratislava Region}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Košice Region]] || {{flag|Košice Region}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Nitra Region]] || {{flag|Nitra Region}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Prešov Region]] || {{flag|Prešov Region}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Trenčín Region]] || {{flag|Trenčín Region}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Trnava Region]] || {{flag|Trnava Region}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Žilina Region]] || {{flag|Žilina Region}}
|}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Country data templates of countries|Slovakia]]
[[Category:Country data templates of Slovakia| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
